falsification_conditions.condition: The asset price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key technical level would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a confirmed bullish trend, contradicting the pattern's implied bearish context.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index rises 8% from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp rally would directly contradict the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern's implied market exhaustion, proving the current HOLD verdict incorrect by showing strong upward momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume exceeds 200% of the 60-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This extreme surge in volatility would falsify the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by demonstrating clear market participation that contradicts the pattern's implied stagnation phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
